mapper.select: SELECT id, title, info, creator, add_time as addTime, deleted, editor, edit_time as editTime, org_id as orgId FROM grade WHERE deleted = 0 AND (#{query.title} IS NULL OR #{query.title} = '' OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')) ORDER BY add_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE grade SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
